titles.title: You are the one that I love

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Nobody else could've changed my heart Nobody else could've saved me Picked up the pieces when I fell apart I'm so glad You changed me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cuz you are the One that I love Light of the world sent from above Sing hallelujah shout to the Lord You are the One You are the One You are the One

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If I knew the song that the angels sing We'd be singing together I can't wait for eternity Praising Your name forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord search my heart And find it ever true I pray that my devotion Always be to You You are the One that I love Light of the world sent from above You are the One that I love
